total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:

    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36

    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---

function.message: Completed. I reviewed the next inbound note and OCR-structured all Juniper-related bills by adding bill-schema YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read system workflow and schema before task work, read nested AGENTS for inbox and finance lanes, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter for migration, and deleted processed inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was to OCR bills related to Juniper. A search in 50_finance/purchases found three Juniper-related bill records, each was read and updated to include required bill frontmatter fields per finance-record-frontmatter schema with line items matching visible tables, and the original body text was preserved. After successful completion, inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
